title: Fantasy 2024 draft board, Jul 2024
html:
TL;DR

  • 2024 fantasy draft cheat sheet — Yahir's tier rankings entering the season:
    • 1st: Breece Hall, Garrett Wilson, Amon-Ra.
    • 2nd: Harrison Jr > London > Puka.
    • 3rd: Nico Collins > Waddle > Adams > Olave; Pacheco > Achane > Etienne; LaPorta.
    • 4th: Mark Andrews, Josh Jacobs, Kincaid (target share starred), Cook > Rashad White.
    • 5–6: Malik Nabers, Walker III > Mixon, Rashee Rice > Diggs > Metcalf > Moore, Zay Flowers > Pittman > Tank Dell, McLaurin > Higgins.
    • QB: Hurts, Allen, Lamar, Mahomes, Stroud, Murray, Richardson.
  • Closing fragment: "Tee Higgins / 1: 140 / 2nd: 40 / 3rd: 20" — likely a prop-bet or contract-tier sketch for league.

Key emphases

"KINCAID. target share"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Middle entry of the fantasy trilogy — bridges 2022 06 14 fantasy 2022 josh allen and 2025 03 09 fantasy 2025 26. Worth diffing:
    • 2022 he led with Justin Jefferson, Josh Allen as MVP;
    • 2024 leans into Breece Hall conviction + Kincaid target share;
    • 2025 is more rookie-RB heavy (Bijan, Gibbs, Jeanty, Achane).
  • The fantasy trilogy is the best longitudinal data on Yahir's evolving conviction-pattern in any domain — applicable to product calls too.

Open questions

  • Final 2024 fantasy result?
  • Tee Higgins prop sketch — was that a side-bet with the peer bet app crew?
